title: Records-class guide (deadname in institutional / public records, incl. legal name-change)
description: Enforces the no-dead-end rule: a record must carry at least one action, OR be high-permanence and explicitly monitor-only.

baseLocale.description: Language this file is authored in (default en). Translations live in sibling <name>.<locale>.json overlay files.

actions.description: Concrete actions the user can take. The no-dead-end rule (below) requires this be non-empty UNLESS monitorOnly is true.

monitorOnly.description: True only for genuinely unremediable exposures. Demotes the item to a 'monitor — can't remove' footnote instead of a task.

harmReduction.description: Required when monitorOnly is true: what still reduces the harm.

allOf.$comment: NO-DEAD-END RULE (scope/docs/09-removal-feasibility.md): either provide actions, or be an explicit high-permanence monitor-only item with harm-reduction.
